title: eupatorium suratense var. typicum
intro: Eupatorium suratense var. typicum, also known as Surat Eupatorium, is a plant species within the Eupatorium genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the sunflower family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eupatorium suratense var. typicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
